title: Glow Squid Spawn Control
description: Returns glow squid spawning to its former glory: (in water) only above stone and variants (granite, diorite, andesite, tuff, and deepslate.)
body: In the good old days, glow squids used to spawn (in water) only above stone below a certain Y level (also in complete darkness.) Now, they'll spawn (in water) on top of whatever (also in complete darkness,) and get all up in your biz!!!! Well I say, no more! Install Glow Squid Spawn Control today and exile the cantankerous cephalopods back to thier stone, andesite, diorite, granite, tuff, and deepslate.
